jobDescription: We are seeking a Senior FP& A analyst to join the Strategic Finance team. Our team leads the Financial Planning & Analysis, Business Partnering, Financing, and Investor Relations functions, and works closely with the Executive team during strategic planning. In this highly visible role, you will own the FP& A function and need to have exceptional quantitative skills, keen attention to detail, and the ability to work with stakeholders across the business from junior employees to executive management. Your work will provide our management team and investors with insights into our financial performance and will enable us to identify opportunities for accelerating growth and allocate investment efficiently. Already in 2019, the Strategic Finance team led the company in raising $76 M in Series D funding and completed a strategic acquisition of Design Manager, a workflow management tool for interior designers. These are just two examples of the many kinds of opportunities afforded to analysts to work beyond their usual department roles.  What you'll do Forecasting, Budgeting, & Reporting Lead the monthly and quarterly financial reporting process to identify key trends and variance to budgeted performance Own budgeting and forecasting processes and analyses involving frequent interactions with executives and business unit owners. Assist in developing the company’s annual budget at a department and strategic initiative level Assess accuracy and predictability of existing financial models Develop long-term forecasting models for the company Assist in the preparation of presentations to the company’s executives and external partners including the Board of Directors and other investors Business & Strategic Analysis Build scenario models to evaluate and prioritize new strategic options. Understand returns profiles of existing projects Collaborate with partners across the company and act as a financial thought leader to the business Ensure we are scaling efficiently and make recommendations for continuous operational improvement Complete ad hoc projects to support business decisions, enhance internal analytics, and streamline processes What you'll bring3+ years of experience working in an FP& A, investment banking, or consulting role Bachelor’s degree, preferably with a finance or other business major Expert knowledge of Excel and Powerpoint Excellent analytical skills with the ability to go deep into the details, then compile key information for business stakeholders Capacity to work across departments and interact with employees who range from the junior level to the executive level Ability to state ideas clearly and concisely, and to be able to admit a mistake Comfort with ambiguity, and desire to improve processes and build business decision frameworks Familiarity with and passion for e-commerce, marketplaces, furniture, and design a plus Experience with Looker, Google Analytics, and/or SQL a plus
